cancel_button_text_2: No, no, I clicked the wrong one
database_verify_failed_detail:
Database table structure verification failed, we will back up the problematic database to: {backupPath}
If this issue causes you to lose data, you can try to retrieve them from backup files.
edit_list_modal.lazzy_parse_meta: Delayed parsing of song tag information
edit_list_modal.lazzy_parse_meta_tip: When enabled, songs will be quickly added to the list, but the song name will be temporarily displayed using the file name, and the song tag information will be parsed when needed.
edit_list_modal.local_list_form.path_dev: The list is not created natively, so the list data is not synchronized natively
edit_list_modal.local_list_form.path_ena: When removing songs from the list, the song files on the local disk will also be removed.
edit_list_modal.local_list_form.path_inc: Scan subdirectories at the same time, up to 5 levels of directory depth
edit_list_modal.local_list_form.path_upd: Mark the list as natively created
edit_list_modal.local_list_form.use_poll: Use polling to monitor file changes

This option is used to solve the problem of list update errors in mounted network locations or other non-standard locations. If no problems are encountered, it is not recommended to enable this option.
extension.incompatible_new_engine: This extension version is out of date and incompatible with the current Any Listen version. Please try installing a newer version.
extension.incompatible_old_engine: This extension requires a newer version of Any Listen to run, please try updating Any Listen
extension.install_local_failed.public_ke: Installation failed, the upcoming extension is inconsistent with the installed signature
extension.list_provider.local_list_remov: {count} local files of [{name}] are about to be removed simultaneously. Do you want to continue the removal?
extension__grant_internet: This extension can access the network
extension__grant_isolate_context: This extension can create isolated runspaces
extension__grant_music_list: This extension can edit your favorite song list
extension__grant_player: This extension can control your player
extension__install_local_failed: Installation of the extension package failed: {msg}
exts.webdav.cache.description: When playing songs in WebDAV, the songs will be cached to the Any Listen cache directory at the same time. The next time they are played, they will be read and played directly from the cache directory, which helps to save the traffic of the WebDAV service.
exts.webdav.cache.name: Enable song caching
exts.webdav.debugLog.description: Used to troubleshoot WebDAV problems. It does not need to be turned on under normal circumstances.
exts.webdav.debugLog.name: Enable debug logging
exts.webdav.form.directory.name: File Directory
exts.webdav.form.enabled_remove.descript: When you remove a song from the list, the remote song is also removed
exts.webdav.form.enabled_remove.name: Remove songs simultaneously
exts.webdav.form.error.invalid_password: Invalid account or password, please go to Settings-Extended Settings-WebDAV Update Password
exts.webdav.form.error.invalid_password_: Invalid account or password, please enter a new password
exts.webdav.form.error.no_password: You have not set a login password, please go to Settings-Extension Settings-WebDAV Settings Login Password
exts.webdav.form.error.no_password_promp: The server requires a password, set the login password
exts.webdav.form.error.test_no_password: You have not set a login password
exts.webdav.form.include_sub_dir.descrip: Scan subdirectories at the same time, up to 5 levels of directory depth
exts.webdav.form.include_sub_dir.name: Contains subdirectories
exts.webdav.form.message.save_password_s: ✔️ The password has been saved in Settings-Extended Settings-WebDAV Configuration
exts.webdav.form.url.description: The URL address of the WebDAV server
exts.webdav.form.url.name: Server address
exts.webdav.form.username.name: Account name
exts.webdav.list_provider.local_list_rem: {count} remote files of [{name}] are about to be removed simultaneously. Do you want to continue the removal?
exts.webdav.name: WebDAV
exts.webdav.servers.description: For the security of the WebDAV service, the login password needs to be set here separately. Each service has one line, and each information is separated by commas. For example: <service address>, <username>, <password>. If there is a comma in the content, a backslash needs to be added in front, such as: "\,"
exts.webdav.servers.name: WebDAV Service List
login.abnormal_disconnection: Unable to establish connection, please check network link
login.blocked_ip: The current IP has been banned
music_comment.hot_load_error: Failed to load top comments. Click to try to reload.
music_comment.new_load_error: Failed to load latest comments. Click to try to reload.
music_comment.title: Comments for "{name}"
music_list__dislike_music_singer_tip: Do you really don't like the "{name}" of "{singer}"?
music_list__remove_music_tip: Do you really want to remove the selected {len} songs?
no_item: The list turned out to be empty...
online.songlist.detail.save_exist_tip: The same playlist "{name}" already exists locally
online.songlist.open_list.placeholder: Please enter playlist link or ID
online.songlist.open_list.tip_1: Cross-source opening of playlists is not supported. Please confirm whether the playlist you want to open corresponds to the currently selected playlist source.
online.songlist.open_list.title: Enter playlist link or ID
play_detail.hide_tip: Hide the details page (right-click in the interface to quickly hide the details page)
player__error: Audio loading error, switch to the next song after 5 seconds
player__geting_url_delay_retry: Service is busy, try again in {time} seconds...
player__sound_effect_pitch_shifter_tip:
Since the rising and falling tone data are currently processed by JS, this will result in significant additional CPU usage.

Known issues:
If the CPU resources are insufficient, processing tasks will accumulate and sound abnormality will occur. At this time, you need to pause the playback for a period of time and wait for the accumulated tasks to be processed before playing again.
settings.common.enable_trash: When you delete files or folders, move them to your operating system's Recycle Bin (Trash for MacOS)
settings.common.enable_trash_desc: File or folder will be permanently deleted when closed
settings.common.transparent_window: The main window uses the built-in rounded corners and shadows
settings.common.transparent_window_desc: After closing, the system window rounded corners and shadow styles will be used, and the software will take effect after restarting.
settings.extension.gh_mirror_hosts_desc: Used for the extension store data from GitHub and the proxy address when the original address of the extension package fails to be downloaded. It will try to splice the original address to the proxy address and then request it.
settings.extension.gh_mirror_hosts_web_t: For the security of the service, please go to the service configuration file to change the settings for the web version
settings.list.add_music_location_type: Position when adding songs to list
settings.network.proxy_desc: After setting, all requests will pass through the proxy server, and the software will not be able to connect to the Internet if it is randomly set.
settings.online_resource.enable_desc: When there is no extension that provides online resources, the portal will not be displayed even if this option is enabled.
settings.other.dislike_list_tips:
1. One line per entry. If there is an "@" symbol in the name of the song or artist, it needs to be replaced with "#"
2. Specify a song by a certain artist: song_name@artist_name
3. Specify a song: song_name
4. Specify an artist: @artist_name
settings.other.resource_cache_desc: Including caches for pictures, audio, etc. After cleaning, these resources will need to be downloaded again. Cleaning is not recommended. The software will dynamically manage the cache size based on disk space.
settings.player.ignore_local_lyrics: Ignore names and embedded lyrics of local songs
settings.player.media_device_changed_pau: Pause playback when output device changes
settings.player.media_device_permission_: In the browser, you need to grant microphone permission to get the output device list
settings.player.status_bar_lyric: Display status bar lyrics (need to enable system tray)
settings.update.allow_pre_release_desc: Pre-release version refers to a version before the official release, which may contain some new features or fixes, but may also be unstable.
settings.update.downloading: Update is found and being downloaded...⏳
settings.update.latest: The app is up-to-date. Enjoy yourself!🥂
settings.update.new_version: Found a new version. Hurry up and update~🚀🚀
settings.update.show_change_log: Show changelog on first startup after update
settings.update.show_change_log_desc: In order to use this software more happily, we recommend reading the update log when using the new version to understand the changes in the software. At the same time, if you encounter problems, you can read the FAQ to find solutions.
settings.update.try_auto_update_desc: Try to automatically download updates when new versions are discovered
settings.update.unknown_tip: ❓ Failed to fetch the latest version information. it is recommended to go to the About page to open the project release address to check whether the current version is the latest
settings__about_p1: Any Listen is a free and open source audio player that currently supports Windows, macOS, Linux and web platforms.
settings__about_p2: We'll keep it pure, and if it's helpful to you and you've got the cash, consider making a donation to support our work.
settings__about_p3: During use, if you have any suggestions or find problems, please feel free to raise an issue on GitHub.
settings__basic_tray: Close the software without exiting it and minimizing it to the system tray
settings__basic_window_size_tip: 📢 Please use the browser's own page zoom function to zoom the interface (using the Ctrl + mouse wheel or Ctrl + +/-)
settings__basic_window_size_tip_mac: 📢 Please use the browser's own page zoom function to zoom the interface (using Command + mouse wheel or Command + +/-)
settings__play_startup_auto_play: Play music automatically after starting the software
theme_auto_tip: Right-click to open the light and dark theme settings window
theme_edit_modal__remove_tip: Do you really want to remove this thread?
theme_max_tip: You can only add up to 20 themes, delete some and add more 😜
theme_selector_modal__title_tip: Note: You can set a light theme and a dark theme in advance, and then it will automatically switch to the corresponding theme you set in advance according to the light and dark theme colors of the system.
update_failed_tip:
Automatically downloading of the new version failed. You can try to download the update again or manually download the update.

The address of the new version is written under the update pop-up window. Download the new version and directly overwrite the installation. If the installation fails, please refer to the common problems to solve it.

Note: Currently, only the Windows installation version can be automatically updated (Linux's AppImage and deb versions also seem to be OK, not tested). Please download and update other versions manually!
update_modal.downloaded_desc_1: The new version has been downloaded.
update_modal.new_ver_desc_1: You can choose to update automatically or manually.
update_modal.unknown_desc_1: The update information failed to be obtained, which may be caused by inability to access GitHub. Please check for updates manually!
update_modal.unknown_desc_2_5: Is it consistent with the current version ({ver}).
update_modal.unknown_desc_3: If it is consistent, ignore the pop-up window and close it directly; otherwise, please manually download the new version to update.
update_modal.unknown_title: ❓ Failed to obtain the latest version information ❓
user_list__add_local_file_failed: U All chosen {num} songs all analyzed all analysis and failure
user_list__add_local_file_success_part: ⚠️{count} of the selected {all} songs failed to parse
user_list__add_local_file_successfull: U The selected {num} song has been analyzed and added
winLegacyMessage.button_goto: Jump to new version release page
winLegacyMessage.message:
You are using Any Listen, which is designed for older versions of Windows. It is only for users who really cannot upgrade to a new version of the system. However, your system seems to be within the support range of the standard version. For the best experience, please switch to the standard version of Any Listen.

Note: The current version lacks security updates and may present security risks, and its functions are untested and may have compatibility issues.
winLegacyMessage.old_os_message:
You are using Any Listen, which is designed for older versions of Windows and is only intended for users who simply cannot upgrade to a newer version of their system. 
This version lacks security updates and may present security risks, and its functionality is untested and may have compatibility issues.

If your device supports Windows 10 or higher, it is highly recommended to upgrade your system and switch to the standard version of Any Listen for better security and performance.
winLegacyMessage.title: You Are Using the Legacy Version
